steps.title: Calculate area of Circle K
steps.content: With radius 8 mm, the area of Circle K is $$A_K = \pi(8)^2 = 64\pi \text{ mm}^2$$

steps.title: Add both circle areas
steps.content: Circle K has area $64\pi$ mm², and Circle L has area $144\pi$ mm² (given). The total area is $$64\pi + 144\pi = 208\pi \text{ mm}^2$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
